issue_title: Website components menu shows multiple active items.
issue_body_preview:
On the project site, go to the "Components" page.

In the left-side menu, under **Annotations**, select **Line Annotation**.

Notice that as well as Line Annotation, **Line Series** under **Series** is also showing as active.
test_description_zh: 访问项目网站的 Components 页面，在左侧菜单的 Annotations 分类下点击 'Line Annotation'，观察左侧导航菜单中各项的高亮/激活状态。
expected_result_zh: 点击 'Line Annotation' 后，仅 'Line Annotation' 一项显示为激活/高亮状态，其他菜单项（如 Series 分类下的 'Line Series'）不应同时显示为激活状态。
